root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because background/shared components (stats lease and its background update loops) can introduce timing-dependent interference across tests. This PR stabilizes the suite by disabling stats lease in tests (`SetStatsLease(0)`), reducing background activity and making behavior deterministic.
fix_pattern: Disable background stats lease in tests (SetStatsLease(0)) to avoid shared-state/timing interference.
